mechanism: Round61 frozen feedback + consistency-adaptive SCD-only on xx/zz subpath

r66_scd_xxzz_consis_mild_f90.description: Consistency-adaptive SCD only on xx/zz with conservative floor, keeping Round61 feedback fully frozen.
r66_scd_xxzz_consis_mild_f90.rationale: Most conservative new-direction probe: only allow tiny SCD modulation on xx/zz while preserving Round61 feedback body unchanged.

r66_scd_xxzz_consis_bal_f82.description: Balanced xx/zz-only adaptive SCD with moderate floor and slope.
r66_scd_xxzz_consis_bal_f82.rationale: Test whether moderate SCD-only adaptation can recover dKg_zz without leaking regressions to yy/Ka_xx-protected paths.

r66_scd_xxzz_consis_slowema_f85.description: xx/zz-only adaptive SCD with slower consistency EMA and higher floor.
r66_scd_xxzz_consis_slowema_f85.rationale: Reduce gate jitter to keep mechanism deterministic/interpretable and avoid overreacting to transient innovation fluctuations.

r66_scd_xxzz_consis_push_f75.description: More aggressive xx/zz-only adaptive SCD gate to stress-test the narrow mechanism limit.
r66_scd_xxzz_consis_push_f75.rationale: Probe upper bound of narrow SCD-only adaptation strength to check whether a stronger xx/zz correction can beat Round61 cleanly.

no_winner_reason: No candidate passed the same-dataset Round61 clean-win gate under frozen-feedback + xx/zz-only adaptive SCD constraints.

strongest_signal.name: r66_scd_xxzz_consis_mild_f90
strongest_signal.signal: best candidate r66_scd_xxzz_consis_mild_f90: dKg_xx Δ=0.703550, dKg_zz Δ=-0.568316, mean Δ=0.143796, max Δ=0.703550

next_best_move: Keep feedback fully frozen; run an even tighter one-knob SCD-only alpha ladder around the best Round66 candidate (single-floor/single-power perturbation) and verify if dKg_xx/mean can improve without yy/Ka_xx/rx_y leakage.
conclusion_line: Round66 did not produce a clean promotable winner over Round61 on the fixed mainline dataset.
mechanism_learning: Freezing Round61 feedback while adapting only xx/zz SCD keeps causality interpretable, but current settings did not yet deliver a clean no-regression same-dataset win over Round61.
